chunks.text: Anca Dragan and Yoky Matsuoka are taking charge in 2017 - EECS at Berkeley CS Assistant Prof. Anca Dragan and EECS alumna Yoky Matsuoka (B.S. ’93) are among Interesting Engineering ‘s “ 17 Awesome Women Engineers ” who are revolutionizing the engineering field in 2017. Anca is described as “one of the rising stars of the robotics scene” as the head of the InterACT Lab at UC Berkeley which specializes in human/robotics interactions, algorithms and compatible artificial intelligence systems.” Yoky is “a hot commodity among major tech companies” as the CTO of Alphabet Nest. Categories Alumni Faculty Honors Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
